svg.title: Skill-Swap Barter Network — system architecture
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture: browser clients at top, PHP application modules in the middle, MySQL database tables at the bottom, all hosted on XAMPP Apache.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a registered user see on the SkillSwap platform?')
sendPrompt('What can a match partner do once connected?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin manage on SkillSwap?')

g.text: Apache (XAMPP) — session auth, routing, business logic

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does PHP session-based auth work?')
sendPrompt('How does the skill profile work?')
sendPrompt('How does the bidirectional SQL match engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does the swap request flow work?')
sendPrompt('How does the private thread messaging work?')
sendPrompt('How does the post-swap rating system work?')
sendPrompt('What does the SkillSwap admin panel control?')
g.text: Admin panel — user management, skill category control, report review

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What columns should the users table have?')
sendPrompt('What columns should the skills table have?')
sendPrompt('How does the swap_requests table track status?')
sendPrompt('What does the messages table store?')
sendPrompt('What does the ratings table store?')
